battleTraits.name: Wave of Terror
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit to use this ability if it charged this phase and the charge roll was 10+. Then, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target has STRIKE-LAST this turn.

battleTraits.name: Ethereal
battleTraits.effect: Ignore all modifiers to save rolls for friendly units (positive and negative).

enhancements.name: Soulfire Ring
enhancements.effect: If any models were slain by your general this turn, Heal (D6) your general.

enhancements.name: Cloaked in Shadow
enhancements.effect: No more than 1 enemy unit can target your general with attacks (shooting or combat) per phase.

enhancements.name: Beacon of Nagashizzar
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
enhancements.effect: Return 1 slain model to each friendly unit on the battlefield.

enhancements.name: Shadow's Edge
enhancements.effect: Your general's Sword of Stolen Hours has Crit (Mortal).

regimentAbilities.name: Death Stalkers
regimentAbilities.timing: Start of the First Battle Round
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit on the battlefield.
regimentAbilities.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for attacks that target that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Chorus of Terror
regimentAbilities.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target a friendly unit that charged in the same turn.

abilities.name: Discorporate
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 9" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has Ward (5+).

abilities.name: Drawn to War
abilities.effect: Your general has Ward (4+) while they are within 1" of this unit.

abilities.name: Reaped Like Corn
abilities.effect: Combat attacks made by this unit score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ if the target unit has 5 or more models.

abilities.name: Chilling Horde
abilities.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by this unit if it charged in the same turn.
